positive: A stylized, modern woodland creature in mid-leap, such as a leaping fox or a stylized deer, rendered in a bold, minimalist silhouette style. The fox is positioned centrally, arched in motion, creating dynamic energy. The background consists of simple, abstract geometric mountain ranges and stylized trees, rendered in complementary negative space. Use a limited color palette of deep forest green, muted sapphire blue, and warm burnt orange. The overall composition must be highly legible and designed for single-color screen printing onto fabric, maximizing strong contrast and clean lines. Vector art style, geometric, high contrast, graphic design poster, central composition, clean silhouette.
negative: blurry, noisy, text, watermark, signature, logo, copyright, low resolution, artifacts, bad anatomy, poorly rendered, multiple subjects, extra limbs, cluttered background
